overview: Quali-T Hormone Optimization specializes in personalized testosterone replacement therapy (TRT) and hormone replacement therapy (HRT) for men and women in Oregon. They use bioidentical hormones and evidence-based protocols to address hormone-related health concerns including low testosterone, menopause symptoms, weight changes, and fatigue.
highlights: Comprehensive free and total testosterone evaluation
Non-invasive shockwave therapy (LISWT) for erectile dysfunction
targetAudience: Men and women experiencing hormone-related health concerns including low testosterone, menopause symptoms, and fatigue.
